checks.name: contract_alignment
checks.evidence: GET /api/v1/parcels/{apn} now uses an async service-backed parcel lookup, returns 404 when missing, and serializes geometry to GeoJSON via Shapely mapping(to_shape(...)).

warnings.summary: Full dependency-based runtime verification remains blocked by the pre-existing requirement fastapi>=0.135.0, which is not installable from the available package index in this environment.
